text:
ury Sun
Mars Jupt
whereas Mars midway between Jupiter Mer.
and Mercury. Mars is placed in his
own sign in Aries. Therefore, there is Dh. Sat
danger of damage to some portion of
the body of the native. In the years 11,
Ven. Dt.
14and 25 the accident is likely to hap
pen during quarrels or while travelling
in a vehicle. Hence, these are the years
when much care has to be taken to
avoid quarrels and travelling in vehicles.
As Jupiter contacts -Saturn first and Ketu next, the native will be
sleeping very often and for long hours. He will have great faith in saints and
sages. He will have lucky days from 20th year onwards.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 295
As Mercury is in Pisces and contacts Mars frrst and immediately
thereafter Jupiter in Taurus, the native will become an expert in two lan
guages. He will have two wives. He will have five issues and may end his life
at 56.
If the Moon be in Cancer the native will have trouble in having progeny.
